citation_short: Memorial Centre of Homeland War Vukovar
title: The Memorial Centre of Homeland War Vukovar, Croatia
strengths: Provides a clean city-siege timeline and an explicit upper bound on defenders inside the town itself.
limitations: The JNA figure it gives is for eastern Slavonia rather than only the city battle footprint.
notes: Used for dates and defender strength, not for the core attacker denominator.

title: The Battle of Vukovar: A Turning Point in the Croatian 'Homeland War'
strengths: Aggregates several key Vukovar demographic and victimization figures in one concise article.
limitations: The central death figure mixes Croatian military and civilians and explicitly notes that the count is incomplete.
notes: Primary context source for mixed-status death totals and Ovčara.

title: Mrkšić et al. Trial Judgment
author_or_org: International Criminal Tribunal for the former Yugoslavia
strengths: High-quality judicial source with explicit caution that exact civilian and combatant death totals cannot be given.
limitations: Does not itself solve the citywide direct-death separation problem for the siege.
notes: Critical source for explaining why the siege episode cannot receive a publishable DR.

title: Revitalizing from Ashes: Economic Development and Business Resilience in the City of Vukovar
strengths: Provides a clean city population figure for Vukovar in 1991.
limitations: Not a battle study; used only for the city population denominator.
notes: Best city-bounded civilian denominator source located in the open workflow.
